should_trigger.prompt: Grill me on this code — find every weakness
Challenge my implementation as a senior Ruby engineer would
Play devil's advocate on my architecture decisions

should_not_trigger.prompt: Review this PR for obvious bugs
Help me fix the failing test
Commit the current changes and push to the remote branch

hard_should_trigger.prompt: Don't go easy on me — tear this apart and find the problems
After fixing the bug, also check if challenge needs updating

hard_should_not_trigger.prompt: Review the changes and give me a summary of findings
Fix this bug then run the test suite and review the results
